decision_summary: Option (b) chosen: engine/rpc/search_candidates.go will issue one btree.PrefixScan per whitespace-separated query term and merge the resulting ScanEntry pools (dedup by FileID/Path) before ranking with the existing, unmodified rankCandidates term-overlap scorer. engine/btree is not extended with a new primitive (rejected option a); the limitation is not merely accepted as-is (rejected option c). Residual gap disclosed and accepted: a query with no term matching any indexed path prefix still returns zero candidates.
